title: Wire Airtable Library to n8n — create credential and update audit workflow
description: Create the Airtable Library credential in n8n using the PAT stored in Infisical.
impact: n8n agents gain access to structured knowledge base.

title: Update OpenClaw TOOLS.md with Airtable Library API endpoints
description: Add Airtable REST API curl examples to /docker/openclaw-xbkt/data/.openclaw/workspace/TOOLS.md so the main agent can query Articles and Problems tables before answering operational questions.

title: Update learning_ingest.sh to POST signals to Airtable Signals table
description: Modify /root/VizionAI/WORKSPACES/vizion-infra/scripts/learning_ingest.sh to additionally POST ingested signals to the Airtable Library Signals table via REST API after writing local file.
impact: All ingested signals become visible in Airtable for triage.

title: Update learning_promote.sh to PATCH Airtable Articles/Problems on promotion
description: Modify /root/VizionAI/WORKSPACES/vizion-infra/scripts/learning_promote.sh to PATCH corresponding Airtable records to status=active when a local learning entry is promoted.
impact: Airtable Library stays in sync with local learning plane automatically.

title: Create wf_library_sync_weekly n8n workflow
description: Build new n8n workflow that runs Sunday 03:00 UTC.
impact: Keeps local learning/ directory and Airtable Library in sync automatically.

title: Import pre-populated CSVs into all 6 Airtable Library tables
description: Import the 6 generated CSV files into their respective Airtable tables: 01_services.csv (17 rows), 02_problems.csv (12 rows), 03_articles.csv (18 rows), 04_recommendations.csv, 05_signals.csv, 06_pro…
impact: Library base becomes immediately useful with real data.

title: Set correct field types in all Airtable tables after CSV import
description: After CSV import, change field types in Airtable UI: category/status/severity/priority/workspace → Single select.
impact: Correct field types enable filtering, sorting, grouping, and API querying by type.

title: Create 5 Airtable Interfaces (Knowledge Base Portal, Ops Dashboard, Ingest Queue, Service Registry, Prompt Library)
description: Build all 5 Interfaces in Airtable Interface Designer as specified in the Library design doc.
impact: Human operators get a no-code dashboard for ops visibility.

title: Populate Services table with live health check data via n8n
description: Create or extend wf_health_check n8n workflow to PATCH Services records in Airtable: update status field and last_checked timestamp after each health check run.
impact: Service Registry in Airtable shows real-time status.

title: Populate Prompts table with all 39 agent system prompts
description: Extract system prompt content from all 39 n8n agent workflow JSONs and OpenClaw SOUL.md files.
impact: Prompt Library enables version-controlled prompt management.

title: Link related records across tables after CSV import
description: After all CSV imports are done, manually link related records: Articles ↔ Problems, Articles ↔ Services, Problems ↔ Services, Recommendations ↔ Articles, Recommendations ↔ Problems.
impact: Linked records enable cross-table navigation and rollup counts.

title: Add a daily trading summary upsert into analytics_daily_rollup
description: Create a daily n8n workflow in vizion-analytics that upserts trading signals, executions, win rate, avg R, and pnl into analytics_daily_rollup for downstream Airtable and dashboard views.
impact: Trading summaries become visible in shared analytics without contaminating marketing CRM tables.
